entries.title: Port MCP client and transports
entries.impact: Generated Python, Java, C++, Go, and Rust packages do not yet expose the modern MCP client, transports, OAuth discovery, or SSRF guard behavior.
suggestedAxirWork: Add or update the TS-derived conformance fixture.
Update AxIR/Core or descriptor data to match the portable TS behavior.
Run npm run axir:conformance:check and npm run test:axir.
